name: Marincess Wave
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>海晶乙女波動</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>マリンセス・ウェーブ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: If you control a "Marincess" Link Monster: Target 1 face-up monster your opponent controls; negate that face-up monster's effects until the end of this turn, then, if you control a Link-2 or higher "Marincess" monster, all face-up monsters you currently control are unaffected by your opponent's card effects until the end of this turn. If you control a Link-3 or higher "Marincess" monster, you can activate this card from your hand.
eff: If you control a "Marincess" Link Monster: Target 1 face-up monster your opponent controls; negate that face-up monster's effects until the end of this turn, then, if you control a Link-2 or higher "Marincess" monster, all face-up monsters you currently control are unaffected by your opponent's card effects until the end of this turn. If you control a Link-3 or higher "Marincess" monster, you can activate this card from your hand.

sets.set: Legendary Duelists: Duels From the Deep

jp_sets.set: Duelist Pack: Duelists of the Abyss

mst: Negates the effects of Effect Monsters
Unaffected by the opponent's card effects
Can be activated from the hand
misc: Requires control of specific Monster card type
Requires control of specific Link Rating
